initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT drivers.forename, drivers.surname, races.year, races.date, races.time
FROM drivers
JOIN qualifying ON qualifying.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON qualifying.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.dob = (
    SELECT MAX(dob)
    FROM drivers
    WHERE driverId IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT driverId
        FROM qualifying
    )
)
ORDER BY races.year ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT drivers.forename, drivers.surname, drivers.dob, races.year, races.name, races.date, races.time
FROM drivers
JOIN qualifying ON drivers.driverId = qualifying.driverId
JOIN races ON qualifying.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.dob = (
  SELECT MAX(dob)
  FROM drivers
  WHERE driverId IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT driverId
    FROM qualifying
  )
)
ORDER BY races.year ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MIN(races.year) AS first_year, drivers.forename, drivers.surname, races.date, races.time
FROM drivers
JOIN qualifying ON qualifying.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON qualifying.raceId = races.raceId
GROUP BY drivers.driverId, drivers.forename, drivers.surname, drivers.dob
ORDER BY drivers.dob DESC, first_year ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT drivers.forename, drivers.surname, drivers.dob, races.year, races.name, races.date, races.time
FROM drivers
JOIN qualifying ON drivers.driverId = qualifying.driverId
JOIN races ON qualifying.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.dob = (
    SELECT MIN(dob)
    FROM drivers
    WHERE driverId IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT driverId
        FROM qualifying
    )
)
ORDER BY races.year ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT drivers.forename, drivers.surname, races.year, races.date, races.time
FROM drivers
JOIN qualifying ON qualifying.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON qualifying.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.dob = (
    SELECT MAX(dob)
    FROM drivers
    WHERE driverId IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT driverId
        FROM qualifying
    )
)
ORDER BY races.year ASC
LIMIT 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT drivers.forename, drivers.surname, races.year, races.date, races.time
FROM drivers
JOIN qualifying ON qualifying.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON qualifying.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.dob = (
    SELECT MAX(dob)
    FROM drivers
    WHERE driverId IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT driverId
        FROM qualifying
    )
)
ORDER BY races.year ASC
LIMIT 1;

candidates.sql:
SELECT drivers.forename, drivers.surname, races.year, races.date, races.time
FROM drivers
JOIN qualifying ON qualifying.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON qualifying.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.dob = (
    SELECT MAX(dob)
    FROM drivers
    WHERE driverId IN (
        SELECT driverId
        FROM qualifying
        GROUP BY driverId
        HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
    )
)
ORDER BY races.year ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT races.year AS first_year, drivers.forename, drivers.surname, races.date, races.time
FROM drivers
JOIN qualifying ON qualifying.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON qualifying.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
ORDER BY races.year ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT races.year, drivers.forename, drivers.surname, races.date, races.time
FROM drivers
JOIN qualifying ON qualifying.driverId = drivers.driverId
JOIN races ON qualifying.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.driverId = (
  SELECT driverId
  FROM drivers
  ORDER BY dob DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY races.year ASC
LIMIT 1;
